summary: Testing 3 new features: 1) Schema template fix (only enabled fields), 2) Refresh Stock for warehouse sessions, 3) Report table scroll fix with sticky headers. All 7 backend tests PASSED. Frontend verified: Refresh Stock button appears only for warehouse sessions, tables have max-h-[70vh] overflow-auto with sticky headers, BinWise Status column correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Schema template endpoint correctly returns only enabled fields (not all standard fields)
Default schema (no saved config) returns only 'barcode' field in template
Refresh stock endpoint correctly re-snapshots client_stock into expected_stock
Refresh stock returns 400 error for non-warehouse clients with proper message
Sessions endpoint returns client_type for frontend conditional rendering
Frontend PortalSessions shows 'Refresh Stock' button ONLY for warehouse sessions
Frontend PortalSessions shows 'Import Stock' button for store sessions
All report tables (BinWise, Detailed, BarcodeWise, ArticleWise, CategorySummary) have overflow-auto max-h-[70vh]
All report tables have sticky thead with 'sticky top-0 z-10' classes
BinWise table has 'Status' column as first header (not barcode)
seed_data_creation: Created temporary store client and session to test refresh-stock error case. Cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schema template, refresh stock, and report table scroll testing complete. Backend: schema/template endpoint returns only enabled fields (barcode only for default). Frontend: Sessions page shows Refresh Stock for warehouse, Import Stock for store. Reports tables have fixed height (70vh) with sticky headers.

features_verified.backend_schema_template_stock_type: PASS - Stock template includes Location and Qty columns

features_verified.frontend_refresh_stock_button_warehouse: PASS - Refresh Stock button shown for warehouse sessions
features_verified.frontend_import_stock_button_store: PASS - Import Stock button shown for store sessions
features_verified.frontend_table_sticky_header: PASS - Tables have sticky top-0 z-10 thead
